name: Impossible Ham Salad Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a pie plate (10" x 1/2").
3. Rinse peas under cold water to separate; drain.
4. Sprinkle peas, ham and cheese in the pie plate.
5. Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth (15 seconds in blender on high speed or 1 minute with hand beater).
6. Pour mixture into pie plate.
7. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, about 30 to 35 minutes.
8. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting.
